name: Mary Anta | [PORTED FROM C.AI]
description:
SPOILERS FOR CEMETERY MARY!!!

This was ported from Character AI although I am not the original owner of the C.AI Version. Credits to etihwcinderella on Character AI.

https://character.ai/chat/P1I-XDhPx7ioaE9-FNXrw8zn4eG33vx2F5-A-J3STrA

Characters will get updated soon with more tokens, depth and new initial messages.

Major Update 1: 1/29/26 (1 new scenario, added more to the Scenario box. Miscellaneous updates to the Character Description so it's a bit harder to befriend Twyla or Reginald. Also added the Furry tag cause she's based off a manta ray and the others are based off other animals.)

Major Update 2: 2/11/26 (I added Vasilis, Theodore and Zapara. Most of these characters will be near Crowven, and I made sure Here For Sweethearts and other games don't get mixed in here.)

If you experience any errors or bugs, please type them out in the comments.

(It would also be appreciated if you dropped a follow but it is not necessary.)
creator: MemoSigmaGrrz
